steps.title: Define variables and relationship
steps.content: Let $T$ be total people, $D$ donors, $V$ volunteers. The relationship is $$T = D + V$$.

steps.title: Compute volunteers and select answer
steps.content:
Substitute $T=165$ and $D=130$: $$V = 165 - 130 = 35$$.
Thus 35 people volunteered.
That matches Choice A — $35$.
